body_preview: - Day 135 (11:12) assessment agent exited 0 with no provider error but produced no assessment.md and no assess.log transcript. The harness reached planning with zero durable assessment artifacts. - Trajectory graph pressure (2026-07-13T11:16Z): task_analysis_only_attempt_count=2, task_unlanded_source_count=1, task_success_rate=0.0, task_verification_rate=0.0
expected_evidence: Next session with missing assessment produces a task_01.md whose Evidence section includes trajectory gnome values (e.g., "task_analysis_only_attempt_count=2 from YOUR TRAJECTORY"). Dashboard: assessment_missing sessions produce at least 1 verified task (reduced task_obsolete_count). Implementation Notes: The preseed script already reads trajectory output an
title: Preseed trajectory-gnome evidence into task_01.md when assessment is missing
